payload.answer: The sender reported joining Point72 last month and requested the AI infrastructure article.
payload.decision: Commit a low-to-medium confidence memory that the sender said they joined Point72 last month; also note the request for the AI infra article as a transient communication intent.

entity_resolution.reason: The sender is only identifiable from the source email context; no durable person identity should be inferred from the available information alone.

payload.intent: Extract durable personal-memory takeaways from a follow-up email, preserving ambiguity and avoiding unnecessary private details.

memory_cards.statement: The sender said they joined Point72 last month.
The sender asked to be sent the AI infrastructure article.

details: Extracted one durable employment update with moderate confidence.
Captured a transient content request without exposing private email details.

repair_options: If the sender identity is known elsewhere, link this employment update to that person profile.
If you have a stored article list, attach the requested AI infrastructure article to the conversation context.
